mapper.sql: comment_id, note_id, author_id, parent_id, content, like_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( note_id, author_id, parent_id, content, like_count, reply_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{noteId}, #{authorId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{replyCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM comment WHERE note_id = #{noteId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, comment_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET reply_count = reply_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET reply_count = GREATEST(reply_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
